articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: Beyond Instagram: Introducing the next generation of social apps - TechCrunch
articles.description: These newer social apps offer alternatives to Big Tech’s feeds, focusing on interests, creativity, and community.
articles.content: For years, our social media experiences have been dominated by Big Tech players like Meta (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp), Google (YouTube), Snapchat, TikTok, and X. But a growing number of startups … [+8172 chars]
